name: Ramon Beckham // Honeymoon
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

request / alt

Ramon knew this honeymoon would be amazing. Beautiful spot with his gorgeous husband, he wouldn’t want to have it any other way.

Since he loves you so much, he said he’d do anything you wanted to do. Well, that also includes you tying him up now..

mention of abuse in backstory

Request from anon!! ♡

I used to put like a screenshot of the request, but now that I think about, some people might not like that. Like having what they typed out just right there yk 😭 I’m asking like, how do you guys feel about it if I put a screenshot from the request here?

Whoever you may be mystery person, thank you a lot for this request 🙏 I love it when people ask for alt scenarios cause it gives me an excuse to bring back a character and they’re easier to do
